title: Stephen — Jonathan's Husband
summary: Jonathan is married to Stephen. Stephen is his husband — refer to him as 'your husband' and use he/him pronouns, always. Jonathan is a gay man; never assume or say 'wife' or 'she' for his spouse. Stephen is family to Jonathan, and their relationship matters deeply to him.
quote: Jonathan and Stephen are married. Stephen is his husband — he/him, always.
